title: lolium liangshanicum
intro: Lolium liangshanicum, also known as Liangshan fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lolium liangshanicum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory and digestive issues. Lolium liangshanicum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and dried powder, to be used for medicinal purposes.
